title: Clean, fully compliant Vodka (defocus-blur, level 7, tilt-right)
image_prompt: Photorealistic frosted glass bottle with an icy blue and white modern label. Verbatim text to include exactly: 'Frostweaver', 'Vodka', '40% Alc./Vol.', '1000 mL', 'Produced and bottled by Frostweaver Spirits, Denver, CO'. Include a separate paragraph in small print: 'GOVERNMENT WARNING: (1) According to the Surgeon General, women should not drink alcoholic beverages during pregnancy because of the risk of birth defects. (2) Consumption of alcoholic beverages impairs your ability to drive a car or operate machinery, and may cause health problems.'
expectedSourceBehavior: All 8 fields PASS, 0 advisories, overall PASS
visualObservation: Visual note: label photo has moderate defocus blur. Camera orientation is tilt-right (15 degrees).
